creator: jamie@catflap.org
text:
Created attachment 195305
patch to unbreak port. apply to lang/gnatdroid-armv7/Makefile

Remove 'BROKEN' : lang/gnatdroid-armv7

The fix recently committed to lang/gcc6-aux means this port now compiles again without any further modifications.


From reading the porting manual, no version bump is required.

Patch attached.
